mapper.insert:
insert into batch.batch_day_replay_entry ( session_id, tenant_id, job_code, source_instance_id, rerun_instance_id, status, failure_reason, started_at, finished_at, result_version_id, created_at, updated_at ) values
( #{r.sessionId}, #{r.tenantId}, #{r.jobCode}, #{r.sourceInstanceId}, #{r.rerunInstanceId}, #{r.status}, #{r.failureReason}, #{r.startedAt}, #{r.finishedAt}, #{r.resultVersionId}, #{r.createdAt}, #{r.updatedAt} )
on conflict (session_id, tenant_id, job_code) do nothing
mapper.select: select count(1) from batch.batch_day_replay_entry where session_id = #{sessionId} and status = #{status}
